---
title: "Unlocking New Horizons in Cognitive Modeling with Simulation-Based Inference"
page-layout: full
---

# At a Glance

Modern simulation-based inference (SBI) represents a merger of deep learning and mechanistic modeling, transforming how researchers think about, develop, fit, validate, and compare computational models. The summer school will guide participants in supercharing their modeling workflows with the latest deep learning techniques.

- Learn the basics of computational cognitive modeling
- Explore deep learning for cognitive science
- Apply modern SBI tools to real data
- Participate in hands-on demonstrations
- Discover new models using unsupervised learning
- Develop your own research project

# Summer School Themes

::: {.grid-3}
::: {.theme-card}
[**Cognitive Modeling**](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1364661319302739){.theme-title target="_blank"}

Learn how computational models are used to explain cognitive processes, from perception to decision making. Understand the principles behind model construction and validation.
:::

::: {.theme-card}
[**Bayesian Analysis**](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/09515089.2017.1297692){.theme-title target="_blank"}

Explore Bayesian methods for parameter estimation and model comparison. See how uncertainty is quantified and incorporated into scientific inference.
:::

::: {.theme-card}
[**Simulation-Based Inference**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2101.04653){.theme-title target="_blank"}

Discover how SBI leverages simulations and machine learning to fit complex models that are otherwise intractable. Apply these tools to real cognitive data.
:::

::: {.theme-card}
[**Joint Modeling**](https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fpsyg.2018.00269/full){.theme-title target="_blank"}

Integrate multiple data sources or behavioral tasks into unified models. Joint modeling enables richer inferences and more robust predictions.
:::

::: {.theme-card}
[**Dynamic Modeling**](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0893608022000732){.theme-title target="_blank"}

Model cognitive processes that unfold over time, such as learning and adaptation. Dynamic models capture the temporal structure of behavior and cognition.
:::

::: {.theme-card}
[**Agentic Workflows**](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41597-022-01387-2){.theme-title target="_blank"}

Leverage agent-based approaches and workflow automation to scale up cognitive modeling projects. Learn how to use modern tools for reproducible research.
:::
:::

# Technical Stack

The summer school is largely self-contained. We will use a mixture of programming languages and libraries:

- Python (BayesFlow, HSSM)
- MATLAB
